target.query: all B-roll footage including audience reaction shots, wide theater cutaways, title cards, graphic overlays, and any supplementary shots not featuring the main speaker person:B on stage
filler words and sounds (um, uh, like, you know, etc.)

ambiguities.issue: The scope of 'B-roll' in this video may include the intro title card, outro credits, audience reaction shots at the payoff beat, and graphic overlays — all of which carry some narrative or contextual value (e.g., the payoff audience laughter confirms the comedic resolution). Removing them will preserve only person:B's on-stage A-roll but may reduce the perceived comedic impact of the climax. Proceeding with full B-roll removal as instructed.
